Ru In Here

Fish n Thangs

Miami Made. Real Flavor. No Shortcuts.

We bring the streets to your plate — fresh fish, bold flavor, and real ingredients every single time. From Red Snappa to Conch Fritters, everything is cooked to order and made with love.

Important Information

Allergen Warning Our food is prepared in a kitchen that handles fish, shellfish, gluten, and other common allergens. Please inform us of any food allergies before ordering. Ru In Here Fish n Thangs is not liable for allergic reactions.
